name: O.G.R.R. Praying Mantis Nymph
description: The O.G.R.R. Praying Mantis Nymph keeps the base species' speed and slashes, but now darts in and out of combat with far less mercy. It is the kind of enemy that punishes impatience more than anything else.
behavior: It pressures with quick entries, short slashes, and jumps so you never get to drop your guard for long. It rarely feels truly still, even when it looks like the sequence has ended.
interactionWithPlayer: It punishes late blocks and rushed punish attempts especially hard. The threat is not always raw damage; often it is how easily it steals the rhythm of the exchange.
interactionWithCreatures: Inside O.G.R.R. groups it often acts as the fast finisher, diving in right after another creature has already fixed your position or forced a block.
strategy: Do not chase it without reading the next entry. Fresh still helps, but here it matters even more to stay calm and punish only when it has truly overcommitted.

abilities.name: Slash
abilities.description: A quick short-range slash used to keep pressure on you.

abilities.name: Hit Combo Slash
abilities.description: A rapid chain of slashes with very little time to answer.

abilities.name: Charged Strike
abilities.description: A slower hit that punishes standing still.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: It lunges directly onto the target.

abilities.name: Vertical Shockwave
abilities.description: A vertical shockwave used to control nearby space.
